input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.1.3.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

            TITLE: covers over suspension and steering components must be removable to allow inspection of

the mounting points

final_answer: Covers over suspension and steering components must be removable to allow inspection of the mounting points
